mapper.select: SELECT a.attribute_id, a.attribute_name, a.type, l.lable_id, l.lable_name, c.content_id, c.contect_name, c.content_time, c.course_contect, c.ipstructional_video, c.video_explain FROM driving_course_attribute a LEFT JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id and l.del_flag=0 LEFT JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id and c.del_flag=0 WHERE a.attribute_id=#{attributeId} and a.del_flag=0 order by a.attribute_id,l.lable_id,c.content_id

SELECT count(r.record_id) finish FROM driving_course_attribute a JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id JOIN driving_course_record r ON r.content_id=c.content_id WHERE a.attribute_id=#{attributeId} and r.`status`=0 and r.user_id=#{userId}

SELECT r.status finishStatus FROM driving_course_attribute a JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id JOIN driving_course_record r ON r.content_id=c.content_id WHERE c.content_id=#{contentId} and r.user_id=#{userId}

SELECT count(c.content_id) FROM driving_course_attribute a JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id and a.del_flag=0 and l.del_flag=0 and c.del_flag=0 WHERE a.attribute_id=#{attributeId}

select DISTINCT count(r.user_id) FROM driving_course_attribute a JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id JOIN driving_course_record r ON r.content_id=c.content_id WHERE a.attribute_id=#{attributeId}
